name_en: .🌷With full original green box packaging🌷Children's Animal Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Series ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative concept of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with Gucci animal prints, cleverly incorporating orange contrast piping, showcasing design ingenuity. Cream and beige Supreme canvas, orange Supreme canvas piping, Gucci animal print designed by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.

Size: 25(L) x 28.5(W) x 11cm(D)

Made in Italy
